Gifting is Launching Soon

We're putting the finishing touches on our global gifting experience. Check back soon!

Recognition and Gifting in One Experience

Make every workplace celebration more meaningful by combining recognition, appreciation, and rewards in a single experience.

01

📋Create a Board

Start a WorkKudo board for any occasion. Set up the recipient, target date, and select a theme template in minutes.

02

💬Collect Contributions

Invite teammates to add messages, photos, videos, and memories. Collaborate asynchronously from anywhere.

03

🎁Add Gifts or Rewards

Enhance the card with physical gifts, digital rewards, or electronic gift cards within your preferred budget.

04

🚀Deliver Together

Send one complete experience combining recognition and rewards. Delivered on schedule via email or shareable link.

New Board Creator
Sarah Jenkins
🎂 Birthday🏖 Farewell🎉 Promotion

More Than a Gift. A Moment They’ll Remember.

A gift is meaningful. Recognition makes it memorable.

💌

Digital Cards

Group appreciation cards signed by the whole team.

📝

Personal Messages

Express appreciation with rich text, emojis, and media.

📸

Photo & Video Sharing

Teammates can post photos and recorded video greetings.

🎁

Physical Gifts

Employees choose from 250,000+ top-brand products.

💳

Digital Rewards

Redemptions from 2,000+ local and global e-gift cards.

📱

Accessible Anywhere

Seamless mobile and desktop access, no app install required.

Give Thoughtfully, Let Employees Choose

Every employee is different. Provide flexible reward options that fit their preferences.

Most Popular

Curated products for meaningful celebrations

Delight your team with tangible rewards. From top-tier tech accessories to gourmet treats and custom swag, employees choose from a curated catalog of premium physical items delivered worldwide.

✓ Worldwide physical delivery powered by global logistics networks.

WorkKudo Gift ChoiceRedeemable
🎁

Physical Gifts

Select from curated global options.

Support Teams Wherever They Work

WorkKudo helps organizations celebrate employees consistently regardless of where work happens.

🏢

In-office

Display group cards on the big screen during team meetings, drop premium physical gifts directly at their desk, and enjoy sharing moments together in-person.

Great for office cohesion
🏠

Remote

Send cards instantly via Notion or email. Enable home-delivery for physical packages with custom-printed greeting inserts.

100% borderless delivery
🔄

Hybrid

Open card signatures online, run hybrid video calls for live reveals, and give options for digital vouchers or physical office handovers.

Flexible team alignments
🌍

Distributed Teams

Handle automated local tax adjustments, global customs clearance, localized brand catalog selections, and multiple currency options.

150+ countries supported
🏠

Bridge distances seamlessly

Send cards instantly via Notion or email. Enable home-delivery for physical packages with custom-printed greeting inserts.

Active Setup: Remote
